name: UnionMedicationTypeAndMedicationType
title: Union of Medication Type And Medication Type

concept.display: Unbranded product with no strengths or form
concept.definition: Unbranded product with no strengths or form. (For AMT this is equivalent to the MP - Medicinal Product concept)

concept.display: Unbranded product with strengths but no form
concept.definition: Unbranded product with strengths but no form.

concept.display: Unbranded product with form but no strengths
concept.definition: Unbranded product with form but no strengths.

concept.display: Unbranded product with strengths and form
concept.definition: Unbranded product with strengths and form. (For AMT this is equivalent to the MPUU - Medicinal Product Unit of Use concept)
Unbranded package with no container. (For AMT this is equivalent to the MPP - Medicinal Product Pack concept)

concept.display: Branded product with no strengths or form
concept.definition: Branded product with no strengths or form. (For AMT this is equivalent to the TP - Trade Product concept)

concept.display: Branded product with strengths but no form
concept.definition: Branded product with strengths but no form

concept.display: Branded product with form but no strengths
concept.definition: Branded product with form but no strengths

concept.display: Branded product with strengths and form
concept.definition: Branded product with strengths and form. (For AMT this is equivalent to the TPUU - Trade Product Unit of Use concept)
Branded package with no container. (For AMT this is equivalent to the TPP - Trade Product Pack concept)
Branded package with container. (For AMT this is equivalent to the CTPP - Containered Trade Product Pack concept)
